file_insights.purpose: Abstract base service class providing standardized CRUD operations with multi-tenant support
patterns_used: Template method pattern (hooks: beforeCreate, afterCreate, etc.)

patterns_discovered.description: Abstract generic service that enforces tenant isolation on all operations by requiring organizationId parameter
patterns_discovered.implementation_details: All read/write operations filter by organizationId and validate tenant context

patterns_discovered.description: Pre and post operation hooks allow subclasses to customize behavior without overriding core methods
patterns_discovered.implementation_details: beforeCreate, afterCreate, beforeUpdate, afterUpdate, beforeDelete, afterDelete methods available for override

patterns_discovered.description: Uses notDeleted filter by default on all queries, with optional hardDelete flag for dangerous operations
patterns_discovered.implementation_details: Integrates with database config's softDelete helper functions

patterns_discovered.description: Automatically emits events for create, update, delete operations with skipEvents option to opt-out
Zod schema validation for input data with override points in subclasses
patterns_discovered.implementation_details: createSchema and updateSchema getters can be overridden; validation can be skipped with skipValidation option

patterns_discovered.description: Uses modelName string to dynamically access Prisma models via bracket notation
patterns_discovered.implementation_details: Requires @ts-expect-error comments due to TypeScript limitations with dynamic model access

gotchas_discovered.description: @ts-expect-error comments required throughout for bracket notation access to Prisma models
gotchas_discovered.impact: Reduces type safety for Prisma operations, potential runtime errors if modelName is incorrect
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Ensure modelName matches actual Prisma model names and test thoroughly

gotchas_discovered.description: All methods call validateTenantContext() but implementation not fully visible in diff
gotchas_discovered.impact: Security-critical method may have gaps if validation is insufficient

gotchas_discovered.description: ServiceOperationOptions includes tx parameter for custom transaction client, but not utilized throughout all methods
gotchas_discovered.impact: Transaction support may be incomplete or inconsistent across operations
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Verify transaction handling in all write operations

gotchas_discovered.description: eventService can be undefined, requiring defensive checks in emitEvent
gotchas_discovered.impact: Silent failures if event emission fails when eventService is undefined
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Ensure emitEvent properly handles undefined eventService

gotchas_discovered.description: MAX_PER_PAGE set to 100, client requests may be silently capped
gotchas_discovered.impact: Large data fetches could be unexpectedly truncated without clear user feedback
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Document pagination limits in API documentation

key_accomplishments: Implemented abstract BaseService with full CRUD operations
Multi-tenant support with organizationId isolation enforced throughout
approach_outcome.code_coverage_indicators: Extensive inline documentation and usage examples provided

recommendations.recommendation: Consider creating a type-safe wrapper or factory for model access to eliminate @ts-expect-error comments
Add comprehensive unit tests covering all CRUD operations, tenant isolation, soft deletes, and event emission
Create migration guide for services extending BaseService with examples of schema override
Ensure consistent error handling in all operations, particularly for missing entities and tenant validation
Complete transaction handling implementation across all write operations
Add optional query result caching mechanism for frequently accessed read operations
